scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run generate:registry && pnpm --filter @vibe-sites/hub build && pnpm -r --filter './apps/demos/*' build
scripts.dev: pnpm run clean && pnpm run generate:registry && concurrently -k -n registry,hub,demos -c cyan,magenta,yellow "node ./scripts/generate-demo-registry.mjs --watch" "pnpm --filter @vibe-sites/hub dev" "pnpm -r --parallel --filter './apps/demos/*' dev"
scripts.deploy: pnpm run generate:registry && pnpm run deploy:demos && pnpm run deploy:hub
